TemplatePrayerBond.title: TemplatePrayerBond
TemplatePrayerBond.Name: [color=#60b0ff]Template Prayer Bond[/color]
TemplatePrayerBond.Description:
On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

     apply [color=#60b0ff]Template Ward[/color] to yourself
     summon a [color=#60d0ff]Template Servitor[/color]
     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Ward duration = 3 * skill level
Heal = 10 * skill level[/color]

TemplatePatron.title: TemplatePatron
TemplatePatron.name: [color=#60b0ff]Template Patron[/color]
TemplatePatron.brief: Template god for custom invoke, buff, and summon testing
TemplatePatron.description_start: Prayer applies a custom [color=#60b0ff]buff[/color], calls a custom [color=#60d0ff]ally[/color], and can trigger any extra effect you wire in.
TemplatePatron.prayer: Replace this prayer with your own god text.
TemplatePatron.description: Use this template when you want one mod to expose a custom invoke, a custom buff, and a custom ally or summon together.

TemplateCall.title: TemplateCall
TemplateCall.name: [color=#60b0ff]Template Call[/color]
TemplateCall.description:
Apply [color=#60b0ff]Template Ward[/color] to yourself

Summon a [color=#60d0ff]Template Servitor[/color]

[color=#50ff50]Heal 10[/color] to yourself

Replace these numbers, names, and colors after the template is working in-game.
TemplateCall.description_short: Apply a custom buff, summon a custom ally, and trigger your own extra effect.

TemplateWard.title: TemplateWard
TemplateWard.name: Template Ward
TemplateWard.description: Replace this with the text for your own custom buff.

TemplateServitor.title: TemplateServitor
TemplateServitor.name: Template Servitor
TemplateServitor.description: Replace this with your own summon lore.

actions.message: Template Prayer Bond triggers. Replace this with your own message once the pack is working.

TemplatePrayerBond.title: TemplatePrayerBond
TemplatePrayerBond.text: Replace this lore with your own text after you confirm the invoke, buff, and summon all appear and work in-game.
